summary: Backend testing for Poker-Style Seat Reservation System. All 7 requested features tested and working: GET/PATCH reservation-settings (6 fields), waitlist join/get/leave, keep-seat status. 15/15 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 reservation settings fields properly implemented with validation ranges
Waitlist system correctly checks session capacity before allowing join
Keep-seat extension tracking uses BookingKeepSeatLog model for audit trail
Authorization checks properly verify creator_id or photographer_id
Default values provided for all settings when not explicitly set
context_for_next_testing_agent: Poker-style seat reservation system fully tested. All endpoints working: GET/PATCH /bookings/{id}/reservation-settings (6 fields: invite_expiry_hours, waitlist_enabled, waitlist_claim_minutes, allow_keep_seat, keep_seat_extension_hours, max_keep_seat_extensions), POST/GET/DELETE /bookings/{id}/waitlist/*, GET /bookings/{id}/keep-seat-status. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_seat_reservation.py can be reused for regression testing.

endpoints_tested.notes: Correctly returns 400 when session has open spots
Correctly returns 404 when not on waitlist

authorization_tests: Non-existent booking returns 404 for all endpoints
